mapper.select:
SELECT cs.start_week AS label, COUNT(*) AS courseCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1)) AS sectionCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1) * COALESCE(c.volumn, 0)) AS studentSectionCount FROM course_schedule cs JOIN course c ON c.id = cs.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE
GROUP BY cs.start_week

SELECT jt.wd AS label, COUNT(*) AS courseCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1)) AS sectionCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1) * COALESCE(c.volumn, 0)) AS studentSectionCount FROM course_schedule cs JOIN course c ON c.id = cs.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 JOIN JSON_TABLE(cs.weekdays, '$[*]' COLUMNS (wd INT PATH '$')) AS jt WHERE
AND jt.wd BETWEEN 1 AND 7 GROUP BY jt.wd

SELECT FLOOR((cs.start_section - 1) / 2) AS label, COUNT(*) AS courseCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1)) AS sectionCount, SUM(IF(cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.end_section >= cs.start_section, cs.end_section - cs.start_section + 1, 1) * COALESCE(c.volumn, 0)) AS studentSectionCount FROM course_schedule cs JOIN course c ON c.id = cs.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE
AND cs.start_section IS NOT NULL AND cs.start_section BETWEEN 1 AND 12 GROUP BY FLOOR((cs.start_section - 1) / 2)
